/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/test_robot_model.dir/tests/test_robot_model.cpp.o -o test_robot_model  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/cat_robot/src/ros2_ws/build/libcreate libcreate.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a -lgtest_main /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0
